products.name: Autopilot
products.descriptor: Model-based integrated autopilot system for multi-platform UAVs

evidence.snippet:
Autopilot
---------
Our model-based, robust, and fully integrated autopilot system offers unmatched performance for UAVs of all sizes and platform types. Designed for versatility and precision, it ensures seamless operation across diverse complex missions and environments, delivering superior control and reliability.

products.name: Ground Control Station (GCS)
products.descriptor: Fully integrated, customizable flight-ready GCS for UAV operations

evidence.snippet:
GROUND CONTROL STATIONS
-----------------------
The Sovereign Ground Control Station (GCS) offers fully customized, flight-ready solutions designed to meet any operational requirement. With a focus on future-proofing and upgradeability, our GCS ensures seamless control and monitoring across a wide range of UAV platforms. Experience unparalleled flexibility and long-term adaptability for your autonomous flight operations.

Flight-Ready Integrated GCS
---------------------------
Our GCS systems come fully integrated and customized to meet your specific needs. Designed for flexibility and long-term adaptability, these systems support future upgrades and ensure compatibility with evolving technologies. Each GCS is equipped with essential components and offers various customizable options to suit different operational requirements.

products.name: GDT Lite
products.descriptor: Ground Data Terminal integrating Sovereign-AS autopilot with third-party GCS computers

evidence.snippet:
Ground Data Terminal
--------------------
The GDT Lite provides a flexible and reliable solution for integrating the Sovereign-AS autopilot with your existing GCS computer systems and infrastructure. It supports future upgrades, ensuring compatibility with evolving technologies while maintaining full control and functionality.
